recommendations.title: New Kids Turbo
recommendations.overview: Five friends from 'Maaskantje' are getting fired because of the economic crisis. They decide that they won't pay for anything anymore.
recommendations.director: Steffen Haars, Flip van der Kuil

recommendations.title: Get Away
recommendations.overview: A family's vacation to a remote getaway takes an unexpected turn when they discover the island they're on is inhabited by a serial killer.

recommendations.title: Bros Before Hos
recommendations.overview: Because of a bad marriage of their parents, two brothers Jules and Max made a pact never to get into a relationship with a woman. Therefore, they live a party-life in which they sleep with a different girl every day. However this changes when Jules s
recommendations.director: Steffen Haars, Flip van der Kuil

recommendations.title: Barry Lyndon
recommendations.overview: An Irish rogue uses his cunning and wit to work his way up the social classes of 18th century England, transforming himself from the humble Redmond Barry into the noble Barry Lyndon.

recommendations.title: Training Day
recommendations.overview: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop works with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

recommendations.title: Hot Fuzz
recommendations.overview: Former London constable Nicholas Angel finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf for a partner. However, when

recommendations.title: Braindead
recommendations.overview: When a Sumatran rat-monkey bites Lionel Cosgrove's mother, she's transformed into a zombie and begins killing (and transforming) the entire town while Lionel races to keep things under control.

recommendations.title: Creed II
recommendations.overview: Between personal obligations and training for his next big fight against an opponent with ties to his family's past, Adonis Creed is up against the challenge of his life.

recommendations.title: American Made
recommendations.overview: The true story of pilot Barry Seal, who transported contraband for the CIA and the Medellin cartel in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Thank You for Smoking
recommendations.overview: Nick Naylor is a charismatic spin-doctor for Big Tobacco who'll fight to protect America's right to smoke -- even if it kills him -- while still remaining a role model for his 12-year old son. When he incurs the wrath of a senator bent on snuffing ou
